featured.title: Modern luxe villa
featured.description: Experience luxury living at modern luxe villa, located at 20 S Aurora Ave, Miami. Priced at $1,650,500, this 560 ft² smart home offers 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and spacious living areas. Enjoy energy efficiency, natural light, security systems, outdoor spaces, and 2 bar areas—perfect for 8+ guests. Built in 2025.

faq.title: Everything about Homely homes
